function lock(address buyer, address seller, uint256 amountKWh, uint256 pricePerKWh) external returns (bytes32 tradeId)
function getTrade(bytes32 tradeId) view returns (address buyer, address seller, uint256 amount, uint256 price, uint8 status)
event EscrowLocked(bytes32 indexed tradeId, address buyer, address seller, uint256 amount)
event TransactionSettled(bytes32 indexed tradeId, address buyer, address seller, uint256 kWh, uint256 totalPrice)
